phases.name: Context detection utility + fingerprint MCP tools

tasks.name: Add is_claude_code_context() and fingerprint MCP tools
tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/mcp.rs: (1) Add is_claude_code_context() that checks CLAUDE_SESSION_ID or CLAUDECODE=1. (2) Add hex_fingerprint_generate and hex_fingerprint_get to TOOL_NAMES array. (3) Add match arms: hex_fingerprint_generate POSTs to /api/projects/{id}/fingerprint with optional project_root in body; hex_fingerprint_get GETs /api/projects/{id}/fingerprint.

tasks.name: Enrich hex_project_list response with actions array
tasks.description: In the hex_project_list match arm in mcp.rs, after fetching /api/projects, parse the returned project list and append an 'actions' array. For each untracked/orphaned project, add an entry: {label, mcp_tool: 'hex_fingerprint_generate', mcp_args: {project_id}, cli_command}. Return the enriched value. When is_claude_code_context() is true, strip any CLI-only suggestion strings from the message field.
tasks.done_condition: hex_project_list response includes actions array with mcp_tool entries
